events.translated: [ Lose your starting Relic Obtain a random boss Re
events.reasoning: Boss relic swap is highest upside. Pure Water is nice but boss relics can define the run. Worth the gamble.
Leave Neow. Got Violet Lotus - excellent! +1 energy on entering Calm. Perfect for Wrath/Calm cycling.
Leave Neow. Got Violet Lotus - great for Wrath/Calm cycling.
Jaw Worm attacks for 11. Vigilance (8 block) + Defend (5 block) = 13 block vs 11 incoming. Zero damage. Enter Calm for +2E next turn.

events.command: play Eruption 0; play Strike 0; play Strike 0; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Eruption → Jaw Worm → Strike → Jaw Worm → Strike → Jaw Worm → Strike → Jaw Worm → End Turn
events.reasoning: In Calm. Eruption (2E) exits Calm (+2E net 0) enters Wrath. Eruption deals 9x2=18 in Wrath. 3x Strike at 6x2=12 each = 36. Total: 54 > 44 HP. Confirmed kill.
Take Ambrosia potion - enters Divinity stance for massive burst damage. Save for elites/bosses.
View card reward options
Empty Body is a 1E Calm entry - critical Wrath exit card. We need multiple Calm entries for safe Wrath cycling. 7 block is solid too.
All rewards collected. Move to map.
Take Monster path (x=2). Need card rewards to build deck before elites. Plan: F2 Monster -> F3 Monster/Shop -> build through F5 -> F6 Rest -> F7 Elite.
Two Lice attack for 7+6=13. Vigilance (8 block, enters Calm) + Defend (5 block) = 13 block exactly. Zero damage. Calm for burst next turn.

events.command: play Eruption 1; play Strike 1; play Strike 0; play Empty Body; end
events.translated: Eruption → Louse → Strike → Louse → Strike → Louse → Empty Body → End Turn
events.reasoning: In Calm. Eruption (2E, +2E from Calm exit, enters Wrath) on Louse[1]: 18-7(Curl Up)=11 dmg, to 2HP. Strike Wrath on Louse[1]: 12, kills. Strike Wrath on Louse[0]: 12-6(Curl Up)=6 dmg, to 6HP. Empty Body exits Wrath into Calm. 0 incoming since Louse[0] buffs and Louse[1] dead.
View card reward
None of these cards are strong enough to add. Deck should stay thin. Already have Empty Body, dont need Tranquility or Wreath of Flame.
Done with rewards, move to map
Only path available. Monster at x=3. Plan: monsters F3-F5, Rest F6, Elite F7.
Slimes attack 3+8=11. Vigilance 8 + Defend 5 = 13 block. Zero damage. Enter Calm for burst next turn.

events.command: play Eruption 1; play Strike 1; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Eruption → Spike Slime (M) → Strike → Spike Slime (M) → Strike → Acid Slime (S) → End Turn
events.reasoning: In Calm. Eruption on Spike Slime: 9x2=18 in Wrath (29-18=11HP). Strike Wrath on Spike: 12, kills. Strike Wrath on Acid: 12 vs 11HP, kills. Both dead turn 2.
Spike Slime at 8 HP, debuffing (0 incoming). Strike deals 6 damage, bring to 2 HP. Conserve energy. Only debuff incoming, no block needed.
Take Liquid Memories - can replay a discarded card. Useful for reusing key cards in tough fights.
View card reward
Wallop is excellent - 10 dmg + block equal to damage dealt. In Wrath: 20 dmg + 20 block. Dual-purpose card perfect for burst turns. 2E cost offset by Calm energy loop.
Move to map
Only path: Monster x=2. Continues toward F5->F6 Rest->F7 Elite route.

events.command: play Strike 0; play Strike 0; play Defend; end
events.translated: Strike → Slaver → Strike → Slaver → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: No Calm entry in hand. Cannot safely enter Wrath (no exit). Strike x2 for 12 damage on Slaver + Defend for 5 block vs 12 incoming = take 7 damage. Best available play.

events.command: play Empty Body; play Strike 0; play Defend; play Defend; end
events.translated: Empty Body → Strike → Slaver → Defend → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Empty Body (1E, 7 block, enters Calm, +1E from Violet Lotus = net 0E). Strike (1E, 6 dmg). Defend x2 (2E, 10 block). Total: 17 block vs 7 incoming = zero damage. In Calm for burst next turn. 3E total.
0 energy left. 12 block vs 7 incoming = zero damage. In Calm for burst next turn.
In Calm but no Wrath entry. Wallop (2E, ~7 dmg with Weak, ~7 block) + Defend (1E, 5 block) = ~12 block vs 12 incoming. Zero damage. Slaver goes from 32 to ~25 HP.
Vigilance (2E, 8 block, enter Calm) + Strike (1E, 6 dmg). 8 block vs 7 incoming = zero damage. In Calm for burst next turn with Eruption in draw pile.

events.translated: Eruption → Slaver → Strike → Slaver → End Turn
events.reasoning: In Calm. Eruption (2E, exits Calm +2E, enters Wrath): 9*2*0.75(Weak)=13 dmg. Slaver to 7HP. Strike in Wrath: 6*2*0.75=9 dmg. 7-9=dead. Confirmed kill.
Slaver at 5 HP. Strike should deal 6 damage (no Weak showing). That kills it. Defend for safety in case it survives.
View card reward
Crescendo is critical - 1E Wrath entry. Much cheaper than Eruption (2E). More Wrath entries = more consistent burst turns. Exhausts so it doesnt clog deck.
Done with rewards. Move to map. At 24/72 HP - need to path toward rest site.
Monster x=1 leads to F6 Rest. One more fight then heal. At 33% HP, must avoid elites. Unknown x=3 leads to Elite - too dangerous.

events.command: play Empty Body; play Strike 1; play Defend; end
events.translated: Empty Body → Strike → Cultist → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Spike Slime attacks 8, Cultist buffs (0 dmg). Empty Body (1E, 7 block, enter Calm) + Strike Cultist (1E, 6 dmg, Cultist hard-scales so priority target) + Defend (1E, 5 block) = 12 block vs 8 = zero damage. In Calm for burst.
Liquid Memories to retrieve Empty Body from discard. Need it as Wrath exit after burst turn.
Retrieve Empty Body for Wrath exit after burst turn.

events.command: play Crescendo; play Strike 1; play Strike 1; play Strike 1; play Defend; play Empty Body; end
events.translated: Crescendo → Strike → Cultist → Strike → Cultist → Strike → Cultist → Defend → Empty Body → End Turn
events.reasoning: In Calm. Crescendo (1E, exit Calm +2E, enter Wrath) = 4E. 3x Strike on Cultist in Wrath: 3x12=36 dmg. Cultist 48-36=12 HP. Defend 5 block. Empty Body (0E from Liquid Memories) exits Wrath, 7 block. Total 12 block vs 14 incoming = take 2. In Calm.
CRITICAL: Must exit Wrath immediately. In Wrath, incoming 28 damage would kill me. Empty Body (0E) exits to Calm, gives 7 block. Incoming returns to 14. Take 7 damage to 17 HP.
Cultist attacks 9. Wallop on Cultist (2E, 10 dmg + 10 block). Defend (1E, 5 block). Total 15 block vs 9 incoming = zero damage. Cultist to 14 HP. Cant enter Wrath - no entry in hand.
Use Ambrosia to enter Divinity (3x damage, +3E). Kill both enemies this turn to avoid lethal damage in Wrath. At 17 HP, cant afford to take 13+ damage.

events.command: play Eruption 1; play Strike 0; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Eruption → Cultist → Strike → Spike Slime (M) → Strike → Spike Slime (M) → End Turn
events.reasoning: In Divinity (3x damage). Eruption on Cultist: 9*3=27, kills (15 HP). Strike on Spike Slime: 6*3=18, to 12. Strike again: 18, kills. Both dead. Zero damage taken.
CRITICAL: 1 HP. Must kill Spike Slime (6 HP) NOW. Strike deals 6 damage minimum. If in Wrath, 12. Either way kills it.
Take Blessing of the Forge - upgrades a random card. Free value.
Check card reward
JUDGMENT - MUST TAKE. Instant kill at <=30 HP (<=40 upgraded). Best finisher card. This solves so many kill-math problems.
Move to map. Rest site is F6, absolutely critical at 1 HP.
Rest site. At 1 HP, absolutely must rest to heal.
At 1 HP, must rest. Heal ~21 HP to 22. No other option is viable.
Use Blessing of the Forge at rest site - upgrades a random card for free. Get value while resting.
Proceed from rest site. 22 HP.

ELITE PREPARATION at 22/72 HP. Forced elite. Possible enemies: Gremlin Nob (punishes skills), Lagavulin (debuffs if you stall), Sentries (need AOE). My deck: Eruption, Vigilance, Empty Body, Crescendo, Wallop, Judgment, 4 Strikes, 5 Defends. Key cards: Judgment kills at <=30 HP - huge vs single-target elites. Wallop gives block+damage. Crescendo exhausts so only one Wrath entry that works once. Must play carefully - zero damage discipline.

events.label: Elite Prep

My deck: Eruption, Vigilance, Empty Body, Crescendo, Wallop, Judgment, 4 Strikes, 5 Defends. Key cards: Judgment kills at <=30 HP - huge vs single-target elites. Wallop gives block+damage. Crescendo exhausts so only one Wrath entry that works once. Must play carefully - zero damage discipline.
Only path available - Elite. At 22 HP, must play perfectly. Judgment is the key finisher.
Lagavulin is sleeping - 0 incoming. Dont attack (wakes it up). Play Defend to cycle cards. Need to draw Vigilance/Empty Body for Calm entry next turn. Save Crescendo for burst.
Lagavulin sleeping. Cycle 2 Defends (5+5=10 block, wont help but cycles cards). Next turn should draw Calm entries (Empty Body, Vigilance in draw pile). Save Crescendo and Wallop for burst turn.

Enter Calm for burst next turn. Lagavulin sleeps one more turn (wakes turn 4). By entering Calm now, I get +2E next turn for burst. Dont attack - save all damage for one massive Wrath burst when it wakes.

events.command: play Defend; play Defend; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Defend → Defend → Strike → Lagavulin → End Turn
events.reasoning: Lagavulin attacks 18. No Wrath exit in hand - CANNOT enter Wrath. 2x Defend (10 block) + Strike (6 dmg, absorbed by 8 Metallicize but still deals damage to block pool). Take 18-10=8 damage to 14 HP. Conservative play to survive.

events.command: play Defend; play Defend; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Defend → Defend → Strike → Lagavulin → End Turn
events.reasoning: No Wrath exit in hand again. 2x Defend (10 block) + Strike (6 dmg). Take 8 to 6 HP. Must draw Calm entries next turn or die. Lagavulin debuffs degrade my stats each turn.
Lagavulin DEBUFFS (no attack) - free turn. Strike for 6 damage. Vigilance enters Calm for +2E next turn burst. Safety over greed at 6 HP. Cant afford to enter Wrath without guaranteed exit.

events.command: play Crescendo; play Wallop 0; play Empty Body; play Defend; end
events.translated: Crescendo → Wallop → Lagavulin → Empty Body → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: In Calm. Crescendo (1E, exit Calm+2E, enter Wrath)=4E. Wallop in Wrath (2E): 9*2=18 dmg, 10 effective vs 8 Met, gain 10 block. Empty Body (1E, exit Wrath to Calm, 6 block with -1 Dex). Defend (1E, 4 block with -1 Dex). Total block: 10+6+4=20 vs 18=ZERO DAMAGE. In Calm.

events.command: play Eruption 0; play Strike 0; play Vigilance; play Defend; end
events.translated: Eruption → Lagavulin → Strike → Lagavulin → Vigilance → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: In Calm. Eruption exits Calm (+2E), enters Wrath. 5E total. Eruption 2E (16 dmg) + Strike 1E (10 dmg in Wrath) + Vigilance 2E (exit Wrath, 7 block) + Defend... cant afford. Playing what I can. Eruption + Strike + Vigilance uses 5E. 7 block vs 18 = take 11. Likely fatal at 6 HP but no better option exists.
0 energy, in Wrath with 0 block. 36 incoming. Will die. No options remaining.
